acceptance_criteria:
1. JinjaRenderMethod struct wrapping PromptValue
2. Object::call implementation
3. Parses style string from first argument
4. Calls render_prompt_value with style override
5. Converts RenderError to minijinja Error
6. render_method() factory on JinjaPromptValue
7. Unit tests for .render('style') calls
8. cargo test passes
title: Implement JinjaRenderMethod callable object
